title: Finding
description: A single research finding attached to a ResearchTopic. Confidence is a probability in [0, 1].

topic.description: Identifier of the ResearchTopic this finding belongs to.

claim.description: The finding itself — a single declarative statement.

confidence.description: Confidence in the claim, expressed as a probability in [0, 1].

source_urls.description: URLs that back the claim. At least one is recommended; the array may be empty for in-progress findings.
